race.comment: OHOPE WINS (1) dominant NZ Oaks winner who was five weeks between runs when never on the track for a dour fourth over 2000m at Rosehill in the G1 Vinery Stud Stakes at Rosehill. Should have taken great benefit from that hit out and ready to stamp her authority today. PROFOUNDLY (3) bounced off her unlucky Kembla third, with an explosive victory over 2000m in the G3 Adrian Knox Stakes at this track last Saturday. Should have little trouble running the trip and looks to have more in the tank. AFTER SUMMER (2) talented stayer unlucky not to get the race on protest with a narrow second in the G1 Vinery Stud Stakes at Rosehill. Placed in the VRC Oaks in the Spring and gets an economical run here. Respect. LONG LEGS (5) primed for this fourth-up and going better than her price suggests. Stalked the speed along the inside and was there at the finish with a close sixth in the G1 Vinery Stud Stakes. Lobs into the right spot and will give plenty of cheek. SOVERATO (4) is a leading contender.
